query: I've got the plan split into three lanes that barely touch each other's files. Let's run an orchestrated grind on it tonight while I sleep.
spin up lieutenants for each of these four work streams, have them open their own PRs, and give me a dashboard i can check from my phone
overnight grind — work the backlog queue in parallel lanes and merge anything that gets a clean codex review. I'll be back around 7am.
We have ~12 PRs worth of work across the installer, the CLI, and the seam layer. How would you drive all three in parallel without them stomping on each other?
lane-installer has been idle for 20 minutes and lane-seam keeps reporting things I already told it to stop doing. is the grind stuck?
codex has now re-raised the exact same three findings on PR #320 for the fourth round and the code hasn't changed since round 2. what do i do
run a multi-lane grind against the phase-2 roadmap, one agent per lane plus something keeping score
I want to kick off a long parallel run where each work lane ships its own pull requests and handles the bot review loop itself, escalating to me only for merge decisions.
the session's about to compact and I've got four teammates mid-flight — how do I not lose the whole orchestration state?
grind plan with lanes, please. conflict-partitioned already, spec is in docs/plans/.
I dispatched one subagent to refactor the auth module and it spawned its own reviewer, now both are hung. What's going on?
PR #412 has a bunch of Copilot comments on it. Can you go through them, fix what's real, and resolve the threads?
is this PR ok to merge? CI's green and the reviewer approved.
can you build me an HTML dashboard showing our test coverage trend over the last six months
set up a worktree for this feature branch before we start implementing
we've got frontier model capacity for about three more days — spec out as much of the backlog as we can before it goes away
the coffee grinder script in tools/ is throwing a KeyError on startup, can you take a look
how did this session go? anything we should change about how I'm prompting you or what's in AGENTS.md?
run the three test suites in parallel and tell me which ones fail
What's the difference between a named agent and an unnamed one in Claude Code?
